title: Old West Inn Building Blocks Set, 2682 Pieces Western Town Hotel with LED Lights, Fully Openable Back Design, Modular Rooms & Story Figures, Adult Collectible Display & Gift
features: 【Iconic Western Inn Design with Cinematic Lighting】 Dual-layer balcony and canopy recreate an authentic Old West hotel façade, packed with bold printed signboards and classic frontier details. 13 integrated LED light points illuminate the inn at night, instantly bringing your Western town display to life with a striking, cinematic atmosphere.

【Complete Hotel Functionality for Story-Driven Town Scenes】 More than a building, this is a fully realized Western town inn. Includes 3 guest rooms, reception hall, social lounge, bathroom, and laundry room, supporting rest, trade, and social interaction—perfect for collectors building a rich, believable Old West world.

【Fully Openable Back & Modular Play Structure】 Designed with a full open-back structure for easy access and display. Pull-out floors, removable walls, and detachable modules allow you to explore every room from multiple angles—ideal for hands-on play, photography, and detailed appreciation.

【Customizable Rooms & DIY Lighting Ambience】 Each guest room can be rearranged with removable furniture and décor. Includes interchangeable LED colors (red, orange, green) for every room, letting you set the mood—from warm vintage comfort to tense, mysterious storytelling—so every builder can create their own version of the inn.

【Rich Characters, Dark Storylines & Worry-Free Guarantee】 Comes with 4 detailed characters, a bathing variant figure, and a horse, enabling dramatic scenes like bounty hunts, secret deals, duels, and hidden crimes linked to the Western town storyline. Backed by Lumibricks 2-Year Warranty and dedicated customer support, ensuring peace of mind for collectors, builders, and gift buyers alike.
